queries.question: Which fashion designer brings all the reporters together?
queries.sql: SELECT Designers.Name  from Fashion_Reporters_Designers join Designers on Fashion_Reporters_Designers.DesignerID = Designers.DesignerID join Fashion_Reporters on Fashion_Reporters_Designers.ReporterID = Fashion_Reporters.ReporterID   GROUP BY Fashion_Reporters_Designers.DesignerID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Fashion_Reporters_Designers.ReporterID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Fashion_Reporters)

queries.question: Give me the fashion designers that each reporter has written about.
queries.sql: select fashion_reporters.fullname , designers.name from Fashion_Reporters_Designers join Designers on Fashion_Reporters_Designers.DesignerID = Designers.DesignerID join Fashion_Reporters on Fashion_Reporters_Designers.ReporterID = Fashion_Reporters.ReporterID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname ?name WHERE {
  ?fashion_reporters_designers a :Fashion_Reporters_Designers .
  ?designers a :Designers .
  ?fashion_reporters_designers p:hasDesigners ?designers .
  ?fashion_reporters a :Fashion_Reporters .
  ?fashion_reporters_designers p:hasFashion_Reporters ?fashion_reporters .
  ?fashion_reporters p:name ?fullname .
  ?designers p:name ?name .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me the fashion designers that each reporter has written about.
